message:
fix(codegen): Detect all assigned labeled blocks for semicolon insertion

Previous detection only caught __m-prefixed labeled blocks, missing other
patterns like set_pyval_N, dict_blk_N, list_comp_N from builtin functions.

Pattern: _ = <label>: { ... } ALWAYS needs semicolon regardless of label prefix

Before:
- Only detected: _ = __mN_xxx: { ... }
- Missed: _ = set_pyval_39: { ... }

After:
- Detects ANY: _ = <anything>: { ... }
- No false positives (checks for '_ = ' prefix)

Fixes test_collections: expected ';' after statement
